'''zhafongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiphydriid|xiphydriid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-f-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiphydriid|xiphydriid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhafongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæfengeth|zhæfengeth]] || [[word:zhæfengej|zhæfengej]] || [[word:zhæfengesh|zhæfengesh]] || [[word:zhæfenge|zhæfenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhafofongoth|zhafofongoth]] || [[word:zhafofongoj|zhafofongoj]] || [[word:zhafofongosh|zhafofongosh]] || [[word:zhafofongo|zhafofongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhafongoth|zhafongoth]] || [[word:zhafongoj|zhafongoj]] || [[word:zhafongosh|zhafongosh]] || [[word:zhafongo|zhafongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhafofngoth|zhafofngoth]] || [[word:zhafofngoj|zhafofngoj]] || [[word:zhafofngosh|zhafofngosh]] || [[word:zhafofngof|zhafofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhafongotho|zhafongotho]] || [[word:zhafongojo|zhafongojo]] || [[word:zhafongosho|zhafongosho]] || [[word:zhafongoko|zhafongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhafongoth|zhafongoth]] || [[word:zhafongoj|zhafongoj]] || [[word:zhafongosh|zhafongosh]] || [[word:zhafongo|zhafongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhafongothol|zhafongothol]] || [[word:zhafongojol|zhafongojol]] || [[word:zhafongoshol|zhafongoshol]] || [[word:zhafongokol|zhafongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhafongothotho|zhafongothotho]] || [[word:zhafongojojo|zhafongojojo]] || [[word:zhafongoshosho|zhafongoshosho]] || [[word:zhafongoko|zhafongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhafongothon|zhafongothon]] || [[word:zhafongojon|zhafongojon]] || [[word:zhafongoshon|zhafongoshon]] || [[word:zhafongokon|zhafongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhafongothoro|zhafongothoro]] || [[word:zhafongojoro|zhafongojoro]] || [[word:zhafongoshoro|zhafongoshoro]] || [[word:zhafongokoro|zhafongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
